title: FreeTrialExpiry
description: Free trials tracked as first-class objects with a countdown to auto-conversion and a one-tap keep/cancel decision surfaced BEFORE conversion (FR-BILL-002). Provided by Module 4 to Inbox (digest alerts), Cash Safety, and Tasks. Keep/cancel is GUIDED, never executed by FinOS (Constitution IV / FR-X-003). Post-conversion cost is integer minor units (cents). Unknown conversion dates are marked estimated, never presented as confident. Each trial carries a FreshnessStamp.

series_id.description: Linked RecurringSeries once the trial converts (optional pre-conversion).

display_name_fr.description: Localized trial label; one-language-only is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

converts_on_is_estimated.description: true when the exact conversion date is unknown; the date is an estimate and MUST be surfaced as such (never a confident date).

post_conversion_cost.description: CAD cost (integer cents) that applies on conversion if the trial is kept (FX-converted upstream for foreign merchants).

alert_window_days.description: Days before converts_on at which the keep/cancel prompt is surfaced (FR-BILL-002; default 3, user-adjustable, spec C-4).

decision_state.description: User's keep/cancel decision. cancel routes the GUIDED cancellation action (FinOS does not cancel on the user's behalf). The decision write is idempotent on source_event_id and audited.
